steps.summary: Prepared docs/reports/real-accountant-session/SESSION_PACKET.md, session invite, evidence template, and session_manifest.json. The packet is ready to schedule and explicitly marks actual_feedback_evidence false until a real reviewer session is completed. Added real_accountant_session_check gate in the packet follow-up to distinguish ready_to_schedule from actual_feedback evidence.
Run the actual accountant session using the field-feedback runbook. Requires external reviewer and schedule. Alias-only outreach ledger checker and update CLI are ready for invite/schedule tracking.
Capture actual public-safe notes and convert safe corrections into queue records.
Close the horizon only after actual session evidence and queue conversion exist.
